message:
fix(buffers): add 64KB limits to stream observers + optimize detector locking

- Add maxBufferSize (64KB) limit to ObservingWriter, teeWriter, captureWriter,
  and URLDetector to prevent OOM on long lines without newlines (caam-g0cq)
- Optimize Detector.Check to use read lock for fast path and release lock
  during expensive regex matching operations (caam-rfa0)
- Closes caam-d4g7 (already fixed in commit b074887)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
